page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Pathway Graph Kernel based Multi-Omics Clustering Approach for Discovering Cancer Patient Subgroups.

Install dependencies: if using virtual env omit --user parts.

pip install -r requirements.txt --user.

For mosek set environment variable MOSEKLM_LICENSE_FILE to your license file install mosek package with
